category_sources: official Eiffel.org release note says the Gobo Eiffel Project provides free and portable Eiffel tools and libraries
source_facts.description: Free and portable Eiffel tools and libraries
display_name_sources: official Eiffel.org release note uses Gobo Eiffel naming
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GoboSoft site; official Eiffel.org release note identifies it as the online Gobo Eiffel documentation
repo_sources: official Eiffel.org release note says the Gobo Eiffel Git repository is available at https://github.com/gobo-eiffel/gobo
tags_sources: source_facts.description: Free and portable Eiffel tools and libraries
source_facts.executables includes Gobo Eiffel tools such as geant, gec, gelex, and geyacc
